source: Hinderer 2018, Hordeaux 2020, Assaf 2024, Bolon 2024, Whiteley 2023, Hutt 2022, Flotte 2022, McIntosh 2022
description: Expected findings for AAV (adeno-associated virus) gene therapy vectors across all common capsid serotypes. Covers hepatotoxicity, coagulopathy, DRG neurotoxicity, and systemic immune activation.

expected_findings.description: Alanine aminotransferase elevation - hepatocellular injury marker
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >5x ULN sustained >7 days, or any elevation with concurrent BILI >2x ULN (Hy's Law analog)
expected_findings.rationale: Direct consequence of hepatotropic AAV transduction. Dual mechanism: direct hepatocyte injury (days 3-10) and CD8+ T-cell mediated clearance (weeks 4-6).

expected_findings.description: Aspartate aminotransferase elevation - hepatocellular/muscle injury marker
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >5x ULN sustained >7 days, or disproportionate AST>>ALT suggesting severe hepatocellular necrosis
expected_findings.rationale: Co-marker with ALT for hepatocellular injury from AAV transduction.

expected_findings.description: Total/direct bilirubin elevation - hepatic clearance impairment
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >2x ULN with concurrent ALT >3x ULN (Hy's Law criterion)
expected_findings.rationale: Secondary consequence of hepatocellular injury. Concurrent bilirubin + transaminase elevation is a danger signal.

expected_findings.description: Gamma-glutamyltransferase elevation - cholestatic/biliary injury marker
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >5x ULN or progressive rise with bile acid elevation
expected_findings.rationale: Secondary to hepatic transduction and immune-mediated injury affecting canalicular and biliary function.

expected_findings.description: Alkaline phosphatase elevation - cholestatic injury marker
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >3x ULN with concurrent GGT elevation
expected_findings.rationale: Supporting marker for hepatobiliary injury complex.

expected_findings.description: Thrombocytopenia - acute platelet consumption
expected_findings.severity_threshold: <50,000/uL (Grade 3) or >75% reduction from baseline; <20,000/uL triggers bleeding risk assessment
expected_findings.rationale: Direct innate immune consequence of high-dose vector exposure. Complement activation by AAV capsid.

expected_findings.description: D-dimer elevation - coagulation activation / fibrin degradation
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Sustained elevation with concurrent thrombocytopenia and prolonged PT/aPTT suggests DIC
expected_findings.rationale: Coagulation activation marker within the AAV complement/coagulopathy syndrome.

expected_findings.description: Prothrombin time prolongation - coagulation impairment
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >2x ULN or INR >1.5 with concurrent hepatotoxicity markers
expected_findings.rationale: Expected coagulation derangement secondary to combined hepatotoxicity and complement activation.

expected_findings.description: Activated partial thromboplastin time prolongation
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >2x ULN with active bleeding or concurrent severe thrombocytopenia
expected_findings.rationale: Co-marker with PT for coagulation dysfunction in AAV coagulopathy syndrome.

expected_findings.description: Fibrinogen decrease - consumptive coagulopathy marker
expected_findings.severity_threshold: <100 mg/dL or >50% reduction with concurrent D-dimer elevation
expected_findings.rationale: Expected finding in the coagulopathy spectrum of high-dose AAV administration.

expected_findings.description: Complement C3 consumption - complement pathway activation
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Sustained depression with concurrent thrombocytopenia and schistocytes (TMA progression)
expected_findings.rationale: Direct innate immune response to AAV capsid particles in blood.

expected_findings.description: Complement C4 consumption - classical pathway activation
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Sustained depression with TMA progression markers
expected_findings.rationale: Co-marker with C3 for complement activation in AAV immune response.

expected_findings.description: Neurofilament light chain elevation - DRG/neuronal injury biomarker
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >10x baseline sustained beyond 30 days
expected_findings.rationale: Non-invasive translational biomarker for AAV class-effect DRG toxicity. FDA and EMA have acknowledged NF-L utility.

expected_findings.description: Cardiac troponin I elevation - myocardial injury marker
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >ULN with concurrent clinical signs (tachycardia, arrhythmia) or echo abnormalities
expected_findings.rationale: Cardiac tropism of AAV9/AAVrh74 makes myocardial injury a class risk at high doses.

expected_findings.description: Hepatocellular degeneration and necrosis
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Marked (grade 4) multifocal/coalescing necrosis with concurrent ALT >20x ULN and bilirubin elevation
expected_findings.rationale: Histopathological correlate of ALT/AST elevation. Liver is the primary transduction organ for IV AAV delivery.

expected_findings.description: Hepatic mononuclear cell infiltration - immune-mediated response to transduced hepatocytes
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Moderate with concurrent hepatocellular necrosis
expected_findings.rationale: Histopathological correlate of the delayed transaminase elevation peak. Responsive to corticosteroid immunosuppression.

expected_findings.description: Kupffer cell hypertrophy/activation - innate immune response in liver
expected_findings.rationale: Expected innate immune response to vector particles in liver sinusoids.

expected_findings.description: Biliary epithelium hyperplasia/hypertrophy - regenerative response
expected_findings.rationale: Regenerative response confirming hepatobiliary injury; not a primary toxicity.

expected_findings.description: DRG sensory neuron degeneration/necrosis - AAV class-specific neurotoxicity
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Moderate-marked (grade 3-4) with concurrent nerve fiber degeneration and NF-L >10x baseline. Any severity with clinical neurological signs.
expected_findings.rationale: Class-specific effect of AAV vectors confirmed across 33 studies, 5 capsids, 20 transgenes. FDA requires enhanced DRG evaluation.

expected_findings.description: DRG mononuclear cell infiltration and satellite glial cell increase
expected_findings.rationale: Inflammatory component of DRG toxicity complex.

expected_findings.description: Peripheral nerve fiber degeneration - secondary to DRG neuron injury
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Moderate-marked with concurrent clinical neurological signs
expected_findings.rationale: Inevitable downstream consequence of DRG neuron loss. The clinically relevant manifestation (sensory deficits).

expected_findings.description: Spinal cord dorsal funiculus nerve fiber degeneration and gliosis
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Any severity with concurrent clinical neurological signs (ataxia, proprioceptive deficits)
expected_findings.rationale: Central component of DRG toxicity complex. Dorsal column involvement explains proprioceptive deficits.

expected_findings.description: Trigeminal ganglion sensory neuron degeneration - cranial analog of DRG toxicity
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Same as DRG
expected_findings.rationale: Sensory ganglia class effect extending beyond DRG to other ganglia with similar vascular access.

expected_findings.description: Meningeal and perivascular mononuclear cell infiltration - CNS immune response
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Moderate-marked with concurrent parenchymal injury or clinical neurological signs
expected_findings.rationale: Expected immune response to intrathecally delivered AAV vector.

expected_findings.description: Injection site inflammation - local immune response (IM route)
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Marked with persistent necrosis or functional impairment
expected_findings.rationale: Expected local reaction to concentrated vector administration.

expected_findings.description: Ocular inflammation - route-specific for intravitreal/subretinal delivery
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Moderate-marked with retinal degeneration or visual functional impairment
expected_findings.rationale: Expected route-specific finding for ocular AAV gene therapy programs.

expected_findings.description: Liver weight increase - hepatocellular hypertrophy and inflammatory infiltration
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >40% increase with concurrent marked histopathology
expected_findings.rationale: Organ weight correlate of hepatic transduction and hepatotoxicity.

expected_findings.description: Spleen weight increase - immune activation and vector sequestration
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >50% increase with lymphoid hyperplasia or extramedullary hematopoiesis
expected_findings.rationale: Expected immune organ response to high-dose systemic vector exposure.

expected_findings.description: Pyrexia / fever - acute innate immune response
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >2.0 C above baseline sustained >24 hours, or concurrent with hemodynamic instability
expected_findings.rationale: Expected acute phase response to viral vector exposure. Analogous to vaccine-associated fever.

expected_findings.description: Emesis / vomiting - acute systemic response
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Persistent emesis >48 hours or with dehydration
expected_findings.rationale: Expected acute phase response to high-dose IV vector infusion.

expected_findings.description: Transient body weight decrease - acute systemic inflammation
expected_findings.typical_magnitude: 3-10% decrease from baseline in first 1-2 weeks
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >15% decrease from baseline sustained >2 weeks
expected_findings.rationale: Expected transient finding during acute post-dose inflammatory period.
